name: Rhythm Drum 节奏鼓
short_description: A dynamic rhythm game where players follow the dynamic music beats by tapping the drums with the mouse and keyboard.
detailed_description:
《Rhythm Drum》 is an engaging rhythm-based game where players hit virtual drum beats using the mouse and keyboard to follow dynamic musical rhythms. The game offers a variety of music styles and difficulty levels, from simple pop songs to complex electronic beats, each track requiring precise hits from players, challenging their reaction speed and sense of rhythm. Players can gradually unlock new challenges and improve their scores.

*Function Introduction*

-More than 80 levels to choose from

-More than 8 unlockable avatars

-Combined use of mouse and keyboard

-Unlock more difficult levels

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
